_comment: Match rules for the contract entity type.
Because contracts have a stable system-assigned primary key (contract_id),
deterministic exact matching on that key is sufficient. No probabilistic
fuzzy matching is needed — two records with different contract_ids are
Blocking: RECORD_ID_PREFIX on contract_id groups records by the first 8
chars of the ID, keeping block sizes manageable while preserving correctness
for deterministic matching (records in different blocks share no ID prefix
When a second source (e.g. DocuSign, CLM system) is added in future, add
a second probabilistic rule here for cross-source matching on contract_name
or external_ref_id. No changes to survivorship_v1.json or code required.

blocking._comment: Partition by first 8 chars of contract_id. Ensures each block contains only records that could share the same ID prefix — bounding O(n²) comparison within blocks.

rules._comment: Rule 1 — Deterministic: identical contract_id = same contract. This is the primary system key from the source database.
